title: Watch: Trump, Melania host King Charles, Camilla in Washington, showcase beehives in White House garden
summary_full: King Charles III and Queen Camilla commenced their four-day state visit to the United States with a warm welcome at the White House by President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. The initial day included a tour of the grounds and a garden party, despite underlying political tensions between the nations.
